Entry.JapaneseText: スパーダ
Entry.EnglishText: Spada

Entry.JapaneseText: ルカ
Entry.EnglishText: Ruca

Entry.JapaneseText: ユーリ
Entry.EnglishText: Yuri

Entry.JapaneseText: フレン
Entry.EnglishText: Flynn

Entry.JapaneseText: おいテメェら、思い知ったか！ 調子づいてんじゃねェぞ！ これは俺達の舞台だ！
Entry.EnglishText: Hey, assholes, ya get it now?! Don't be so full o' yourselves! This is our stage!

Entry.JapaneseText: ちょ、ちょっとスパーダ、 僕達だけのってワケじゃ…
Entry.EnglishText: W-Wait a second, Spada, it's not just ours...

Entry.JapaneseText: あーわかったよ、強いな、お前ら
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah, I gotcha, you guys're tough.
Entry.Notes: Will edit this depending on how the acting is, because that will tell me if this is "yeah" or Ahhh" like "ah man".

Entry.JapaneseText: ああ、息があった二人ならではの 見事な戦いだった
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah. It was a magnificent battle with the two of you being so in sync.

Entry.JapaneseText: そ、そうかな
Entry.EnglishText: Y-You think so?

Entry.JapaneseText: ここでの戦いは、共に戦う仲間との絆が これまで以上に大切になるんだ
Entry.EnglishText: Our bonds from fighting together in this battle will be even more valuable going forward.

Entry.JapaneseText: 敵の数が多いし、一息つく余裕もないからな。 背中をまかせられる奴がいねぇと、辛いぜ？
Entry.EnglishText: There're tons of enemies, so we don't get any room to breathe. It's rough when you don't have someone to watch your back, you know?

Entry.JapaneseText: ユーリ、その意味では、 僕は君と組めてよかったと心から思うよ
Entry.EnglishText: Yuri, for that, I am sincerely grateful I could partner with you.

Entry.JapaneseText: そりゃお互い様だ。 だが、今回はこいつらに遅れをとっちまったな
Entry.EnglishText: The feeling's mutual. But we did lag behind these guys this time.

Entry.JapaneseText: ああ、反省が必要だ。 気を引き締めなおして、さっそく稽古しよう
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah, reflection will be necessary. We have to pull ourselves together and start training right away.

Entry.JapaneseText: おいおい、今からか？
Entry.EnglishText: Hey, hey, right now?

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕達も彼らに負けてられないからね
Entry.EnglishText: Like them, we can't let ourselves lose either.

Entry.JapaneseText: ったく、お前は真面目だよ… だがまあ、そうだな、 まずは俺達二人の呼吸を思いださねぇと
Entry.EnglishText: Geez, you're so earnest... But, well, you're right. First thing we gotta do is get our synchronization back in order.

Entry.JapaneseText: 心配しなくとも、すぐに思い出してみせるさ。 それに、まだ本番までは時間もあるようだしね
Entry.EnglishText: Don't worry, we'll get it back in order right away. Plus, we seem to have sufficient time before the real battles.

Entry.JapaneseText: え、そうなの？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? We do?

Entry.JapaneseText: そーだよ。最初っから紹介だって言ってんだろ
Entry.EnglishText: Yeeeah, we do. I told ya from the beginnin' that this was an introduction, didn't I?

Entry.JapaneseText: お前ら、次は今回みたいにはいかねぇからな
Entry.EnglishText: It won't be like this next time, you guys.

Entry.JapaneseText: どーだかな！ まァ、楽しみにしといてやるよ
Entry.EnglishText: Weee'll see about that! But well, I look forward to it.

Entry.JapaneseText: それはありがたいね。 それじゃあユーリ、 今から軽く腕慣らしでもどうだい？
Entry.EnglishText: I'm grateful for that. Alright then, Yuri. Perhaps we can do some light warm-ups now?

Entry.JapaneseText: いいぜ、期待を裏切るわけにはいかねぇからな
Entry.EnglishText: Oh yeah. I won't be betraying your expectations.
Entry.Notes: Need to hear how Yuri says "いいぜ". Sometimes he has a really sorta like, "all in" type of voice? If he just says it really "normally" (?), I plan to change it to "sure". Can maybe find something else to change it to if he has That Voice, but I couldn't think of anything strong enough.

Entry.JapaneseText: はぁ、勝ててよかった…
Entry.EnglishText: Haa. I'm relieved we won.

Entry.JapaneseText: なンだよ、ルカ。情けねぇなぁ
Entry.EnglishText: The heck, Ruca. That's pathetic.

Entry.JapaneseText: だって、いつもの戦いと全然感じが違ったし…
Entry.EnglishText: Well I mean, that felt totally different from our usual battles.

Entry.JapaneseText: けどよ、面白かっただろ？
Entry.EnglishText: But it was fun, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: それは…うん、そうだね。 なんだかスッキリしたし、本番が楽しみ、かな
Entry.EnglishText: That's... Yeah, you're right. I feel refreshed, and I'm looking forward to the real battles.

Entry.JapaneseText: そうそう、待ちきれねェだろ！ ヒャッヒャッヒャッ！
Entry.EnglishText: For sure! Ya can't wait, right?! Hyahahahehe!

Entry.JapaneseText: BG02a.ppt
